items.name: calendar-heatmap
items.title: CalendarHeatmap
items.description: GitHub-style yearly contribution grid. Supports multiple years, ISO Monday start, custom colors, i18n labels, and full tooltip control.

items.name: weekday-heatmap
items.title: WeekdayHeatmap
items.description: Weekday × hour-of-day matrix for recurring weekly patterns. Supports optional aggregate rows and columns with custom compute functions, i18n, and custom colors.

items.name: date-heatmap
items.title: DateHeatmap
items.description: Date × hour grid for zoomed time windows (1–4 weeks). Supports optional aggregate rows and columns with custom compute functions, i18n, and custom colors.

items.name: status-heatmap
items.title: StatusHeatmap
items.description: Daily status timeline for uptime or incident history. Four status levels (healthy / degraded / critical / no data), custom colors, i18n, and adjustable label intervals.
